title: Paul's Tweaks
description: Things Paul (any his boys) wants in minecraft
body:
# Paul's Tweaks - Things Paul wants in Minecraft
*This mod was made for me and my friends to play on our personal server, because of this, the mod may seem unbalanced/unrefined.*

This is a culmination of weird things I think Minecraft should just have. Many of these changes are QoL changes, some are whole features. You can request features on GitHub via the issues tab. 

## Features
- Soul gems (Stores XP)
- Leather crafting (Smelt/Smoke flesh to leather)
- Nametag crafting
- Stonecutting wood (Make wooden slabs and such on stonecutter)
- Sugarcane block (Like a haybale)
- Right-click crops to harvest AND replant
- Additional blasting furnace recipes (Stone, glass, etc.)
- Warts from wart block

### Soul Gems
Shift + Right-click on enchanting table to fill the soul gem.

Right-click on any other block to empty the soul gem.
- Copper soul gem holds 5 levels
- Iron soul gem holds 10 levels
- Gold soul gem holds 15 levels
- Netherite soul gem holds 30 levels
